excluded_after_blinded_completion.reason: Both arms failed a hidden max_delay=0 assertion that was not stated by the frozen Acceptance Spec; retained as a dataset-defect record but excluded from quality inference.

notes: Task 03 Terra was run first as a Runtime smoke. The original remaining arm order was frozen with Python random.Random(20260712).shuffle and executed in waves of at most four independent clones. Task 13 was frozen as a replacement only after Task 08 completed both arms and was classified as an invalid sample; Task 08 artifacts remain preserved.
